summary: Trino 482 reads the seeded Currency v1 parquet delivery from live AIStor through the aistor Hive catalog, returns the expected 180 rows, and passes the Trino execution pipeline validation test.
assertions: The validation test targets the same seeded Currency v1 AIStor parquet path used by the Spark Expectations real AIStor validator
The test registers the existing parquet location as an external Trino table through the aistor Hive catalog
The test executes a DQ-style count query through the Trino execution pipeline and persists Trino artifacts when live dependencies are configured
The validation wrapper runs this AIStor parquet test in non-dry-run mode and fails when live tests skip
The live seed command uploaded the expected Currency v1 parquet delivery to AIStor: 180 rows across 2 parquet files
The running Trino CLI reports version 482 and a direct Trino count over the external table returns 180
The focused live pytest passes after recreating the external table metadata against the seeded AIStor parquet location

diagnostics.seed_result: Completed 1 delivery object upload(s); 180 rows, 2 file(s)
diagnostics.root_cause_fixed: Trino 482 could reach AIStor health checks, but the aistor DNS alias resolved ambiguously during S3 split reads. dq-trino/etc/catalog/aistor.properties now uses the explicit dq-made-easy-aistor alias.
